title: PluginHiderV2
description: This Plugin removes the ability for Hacked Clients to do .server plugins and see all your server plugins
body:
InvisibleFoliaCore is a lightweight, fully hidden Folia plugin with zero performance impact.
Features:

Blocks /pl and /plugins commands silently
Clears the command tree so clients see no commands at all
No config, no commands, no channels — completely invisible

Compatibility:

Folia 1.20+
Paper/Spigot compatible
